---
name: git
description: Guide Git workflows, branch management, resolving conflicts, and composing commit messages
allowed-tools: []
---

Use this skill when asked to help with Git workflows, branch management, resolving conflicts, and composing commit messages.

When running commands, operate from the repository root. Confirm before executing any destructive commands (force-push, reset, clean).

Examples:
- "Fix my merge conflict on branch X"
- "Suggest git commands to squash commits"
